stocks.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
stocks.notes:
Very nice margins
Dropped crucial brand to focus on b2b

https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!zn7a!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fca046a1f-5b73-49b8-a856-ca470266ba99_2740x1539.png          

Benefiting recently from the demand driven increase in NAND and DRAM prices
Micron produces both DRAM and NAND flash memory, with a product portfolio heavily weighted toward DRAM

Very sensitive to
- boom-and-bust cycles of the semiconductor memory industry.
- Following the pandemic-era boom, consumer demand for personal computers (PCs) and smartphones dropped significantly in 2022.
- Due to overestimating demand, chipmakers and their customers were left with massive stockpiles of NAND and DRAM chips. This oversupply led to a "freefall" in memory prices. After that they refused to increase capacity in production in the AI cycle fearing a second fall. When that never happened, underprovisioning demand and very long build time of factories is causing a demand driven push of prices. In summary, high inertia sector sensitive to demand swings.

But as AI is showing no sign of slowing down, will this continue ? and for how long ? it depends on the speed of building factories compared to the growing needs in memory of AI
Will AI growth correlate to a growth in memory needs or will smart AI compression techniques mitigate this ?
